title: Goa SSC Admit Card 2026 Overview

detail.title: Goa SSC Admit Card 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: Goa SSC Admit Card 2026 released by GBSHSE. Students can download the Goa Board Class 10 hall ticket, check exam dates, instructions, and steps to download SSC admit card at gbshse.in.

content.text: Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board SSC Exam Admit Card 2026 has been released by Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board on To Be Announced for the upcoming 2025-2026, which will be conducted from 13-03-2026 to 09-04-2026.

Students appearing in the exam must download and print their Exam Admit Card to enter the examination centre, as no candidate will be permitted without a valid hall ticket. To access the Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board SSC Admit Card, students can visit the official website, gssc.goa.gov.in, or use the direct Exam Admit Card download link given below.
Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board has issued the SSC Admit Card for the 2025-2026 on its official website. Here are the key details:

rows: Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board

sections.heading: Goa SSC Admit Card 2026 Direct Download Link

content.text: Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board has activated the official hall ticket download link for the SSC Admit Card 2026. Registered candidates can check and download their Admit Cards through the link given below.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Goa SSC Admit Card 2026

content.text: After downloading the Admit Card, students should verify all details carefully. The Admit Card/hall ticket usually includes the following:

items: Candidate's name and roll number
Registration number and course details
Exam date and reporting time
Exam center name and address
Photograph and signature
Subject/paper details (if applicable)
Important instructions for exam day

content.text: If any detail appears incorrect, contact the Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board examination office immediately for rectification.

sections.heading: How to Download Goa SSC Admit Card 2026 Online?

content.text: Goa Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board has made the Admit Card download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view Admit Cards on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the official website gssc.goa.gov.in.
Click on the Admit Card / Hall Ticket link on the homepage.
Enter your Registration Number / Roll Number and Date of Birth.
Click Submit and your Admit Card will appear on the screen.
Download and print the Admit Card for exam use.
Double-check all personal details on the Admit Card immediately after downloading.
Carry a government-issued photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport) along with the Admit Card.
Report to the examination centre at least 30 minutes before the scheduled start time.
Mobile phones, smartwatches, and electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the exam hall.
Keep multiple printouts of the Admit Card to avoid last-minute issues.
